Nightlamp
Open Source · Apache-2.0
Health-check recipes

For the failures that silently break no-code apps.

Scenario-specific monitors and triage for Bubble, Lovable & Webflow apps. Copy a recipe — know what to look at first when revenue quietly stops.

checkout webhooks auth lead forms DNS / SSL cron third-party APIs
